mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT HST_DSCD AS hstDscd ,ITEM_ID AS itemId ,WORK_CTT_CD AS workCttCd ,LOG_OCCUR_DTTM AS workDttm ,USER_ID AS userId ,ITEM_DESC AS itemDesc ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBACTIONHISTHS WHERE 1=1
AND HST_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{hstDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ITEM_ID like CONCAT('%',#{itemId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND WORK_CTT_CD = #{workCttCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND LOG_OCCUR_DTTM BETWEEN #{workDttmFrom, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and #{workDttmTo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND USER_ID like CONCAT('%',#{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ITEM_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{itemDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by LOG_OCCUR_DTTM desc ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBACTIONHISTHS WHERE 1=1
AND HST_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{hstDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ITEM_ID like CONCAT('%',#{itemId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND WORK_CTT_CD = #{workCttCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND LOG_OCCUR_DTTM BETWEEN #{workDttmFrom, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and #{workDttmTo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND USER_ID like CONCAT('%',#{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ITEM_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{itemDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT HST_DSCD AS hstDscd ,ITEM_ID AS itemId ,WORK_CTT_CD AS workCttCd ,LOG_OCCUR_DTTM AS workDttm ,USER_ID AS userId ,ITEM_DESC AS itemDesc FROM TBACTIONHISTHS
